contracts.applies_to: The top-skill package as loaded by an AI runtime.
contracts.readiness_rule: Use for runtime skill loading and hydrated task execution. Hydration must validate references before stable work begins.

contracts.applies_to: The top-skill package when it is being maintained, released, or validated as a skill system.
contracts.readiness_rule: Use for top-skill maintenance and release claims. The skill is not release-ready if these artifacts are missing, stale, or contradicted by root package metadata.

contracts.applies_to: A target project undergoing TOP migration.
contracts.readiness_rule: Use for migration-mode tasks that create or change TOP artifacts in a target project. Branch workflow JSON is the machine-readable process graph; the branch plan is human-readable intent; the shared log is append-only evidence; shared status must preserve previous branch history.
